out_of_scope_note: Behavioral ecology field study of agonistic interactions and shelter occupation in crayfish (Orconectes rusticus). 'Hierarchical decision making' in the title refers to social dominance hierarchies in animals, not hierarchical inference or computational decision-theoretic models. No computational neuroscience framework, neural mechanism, or decision-theoretic formalism is engaged. Out of scope for a computational-neuroscience lab.
